user.title: Femmto Scale
user.description: Configure the Femmto BWS12 Bluetooth scale.

data.name: Name
data.min_weight_kg: Minimum weight to consider a measurement (kg)
data.stability_delta_kg: Fallback maximum variation for stable reading (kg)
data.stability_samples: Fallback minimum samples for stable reading
data.repeat_stable_samples: Repeated identical packets required for stable reading
data.stable_hold_seconds: Seconds to keep Measurement Stable ON after detection
